sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id UInt32, arr Array(UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayEnumerateDenseRanked(1, arr, 1) AS enumerated FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_array SET arr = [50, 10, 30] WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, arrayEnumerateDenseRanked(2, [[10,10,30,20],[40,50,10,30]], 2) AS deep_enumerated FROM test_array;
